# @n8n-dev/n8n-nodes-ntropy-network

![ntropy-network Banner](banner.svg)

[![npm version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/@n8n-dev/n8n-nodes-ntropy-network.svg)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@n8n-dev/n8n-nodes-ntropy-network)
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)

---

**Stop writing ntropy-network API integrations by hand.**

Every time you connect n8n to ntropy-network, you waste hours mapping endpoints, defining parameters, and debugging schemas. You copy-paste from docs, fix edge cases, and pray nothing breaks.

**What if connecting n8n to ntropy-network took 5 minutes, not half a day?**

This node gives you **5+ resources** out of the box: **Classifier**, **Consumer**, **Batch**, **Business**, **Batch 1**: with full CRUD operations, typed parameters, and zero manual configuration.

---

## What You Get

- **Zero boilerplate**: Resources, operations, and fields are pre-configured and ready to use
- **Full CRUD**: Create, read, update, and delete support where the API allows it
- **Typed parameters**: No more guessing field types
- **Built-in auth**: API key authentication, ready to go
- **Declarative**: Native n8n performance, no custom execute() overhead

---

## Install

```bash
npm install @n8n-dev/n8n-nodes-ntropy-network
```

**Or in n8n:**
1. **Settings → Community Nodes → Install**
2. Search: `@n8n-dev/n8n-nodes-ntropy-network`
3. Click **Install**

---

## Quick Start

1. Install the node (above)
2. Add credentials: **ntropy-network API** → paste your API key
3. Drag the **ntropy-network** node into your workflow
4. Pick a resource → pick an operation → done.

That's it. No configuration files. No code. It just works.

---

## Resources

| Resource | Operations |
|----------|------------|
| Classifier | Get a batch of business transaction classification results, Get a batch of consumer transaction classification results |
| Consumer | Get a batch of consumer transaction classification results |
| Batch | Get a batch of consumer transaction classification results |
| Business | Get a batch of business transaction classification results |
| Batch 1 | Get a batch of business transaction classification results |

---

## Why This Node?

**Without this node:**
- Hours of manual API integration
- Copy-pasting from ntropy-network docs
- Debugging auth, pagination, error handling
- Maintaining your own client code

**With this node:**
- Install → configure → use. 5 minutes.
- Auto-generated from the official ntropy-network OpenAPI spec
- Always up to date when the API changes
- Native n8n performance

---

## Auto-Generated
This node was auto-generated from the official **ntropy-network** OpenAPI specification using
[@n8n-dev/n8n-openapi-node-ultimate](https://github.com/kelvinzer0/n8n-openapi-node-ultimate),
then validated against the live API so you get accurate types and real parameters, not guesswork.

When the ntropy-network API updates, this node updates too.

---

## Support This Project

If this node saved you hours of work, consider supporting continued development, new APIs, better error handling, and faster updates.
